description: Project-shape constraint surface — captures Time × Cost × Scope and computes a single integer capacityPoints budget that downstream Planning Pack components (notably <nfr-compass>) read.

attributes.name: data-focus-factor
attributes.description: Multiplier in the default capacity formula (0–1; the share of FTE available for engineering quality work)

attributes.name: data-capacity-formula
attributes.description: Custom formula string (out of scope v1)

slots.name: title
slots.description: Heading text shown above the form

events.name: iron-triangle:change
events.detail: { time, cost, scope, capacityPoints, capacitySource, hash, source }

events.name: iron-triangle:revise
events.description: A revision is committed via revise()

events.name: iron-triangle:mode
events.description: Capacity source flips between formula and manual
